new_classes.label_en: other still wine of fresh grapes in containers > 2 L (CN 2204 22 98)
new_classes.label_de: anderer Stillwein aus frischen Weintrauben in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2204 22 98)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes, not bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) or protected geographical indication (PGI), and not otherwise specified among subheadings 2204 22 22 to 2204 22 93, presented in containers with a nominal volume greater than 2 litres. The total dry extract is characterised by non-volatile constituents including sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts, as defined in additional note 4(A) to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the principal distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 22 98: (1) it is a wine of fresh grapes (parent class); (2) it is presented in a container with a volume > 2 L (LargeContainer restriction via BFO:has_part); (3) it lacks PDO (complement restriction on ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality); (4) it lacks PGI (complement restriction on ProtectedGeographicalIndicationQuality); and (5) it bears the TotalDryMatterQuality that includes the legally defined non-volatile constituents (sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter, salts) per additional note 4(A). The coverage gap (~28%) relates to: (a) the residual "other" character of this code — it is the catch-all among 2204 22 22–98 after excluding all named sub-categories (Tokaj, PDO still, PGI still, other still 2204 22 93), which cannot be exhaustively modelled without enumerating all sibling codes in complement form; (b) the specific chemical composition thresholds in additional notes 4 and 5 (total dry extract values by sugar content category) that require numeric range restrictions not yet supported by a property linking TotalDryMatterQuality to a gram-per-litre value — no such datatype property exists in the current TBox.
